purpose: Immutable optional packs (prompt §13). Relocated code/bytes leave the default checkout but stay fully accounted (hydrated_owned_LOC) and reversible. No hidden external repository: a pack IS a named subset of the tree at a source commit, hydratable from git history (or regenerable from committed builders).

packs.name: computexchange-render-lab
packs.reason: Preview/verify PNGs, reference rack-datasheet PDFs/JPGs, and the .glb geometry master are render research inputs/outputs — not shipped (the site ships web/assets/site/*), not built, not tested, not CI-referenced. The repo's own .gitignore already declares render images/binaries strippable; these were force-added.
packs.digest_method: sha256 over the sorted `sha256  path` list; per-file hashes in census/pack-render-lab-files.json
packs.kept_in_default_checkout: render/*.py builders, render/*.sh workflows, render/*.md reports/specs, render/panel/**, render/handoff/** (proof-bound by proof/claims/claim-policy.json), render ledgers (*-raw.json).
packs.hydration_command: git checkout 96a4890 -- render/site/previews render/previews render/verify render/ref render/gltf
packs.regeneration: re-run render/build_scene.py / render/build_rack.py / render/site/oracles.py (Blender + Metal) to rebuild the images and .glb.
packs.rollback: the files remain at 96a4890 in git history; nothing is destroyed.

packs.name: computexchange-benchmarks
packs.reason: Speed-lane + bench-local research outputs: the cx_denoiser .pt/.onnx model artifacts (~9 MB) and large spec-lab .jsonl ledgers (~12 MB). Referenced only by manual spec-lab research scripts (run_denoiser_experiment.py, eval_cx_denoiser.py) — NOT by the green Makefile/CI test path, and NOT proof/claim-bound (verified against proof/claims/claim-policy.json and source_fingerprint).
packs.digest_method: sha256 over the sorted `sha256  path` list; per-file hashes in census/pack-benchmarks-files.json
packs.regeneration: re-run the spec-lab bench drivers (scripts/spec-lab/run_*.py) / make bench-local.
packs.rollback: the files remain at 96a4890 in git history; nothing is destroyed.
